sentence: 孩子最喜欢坐双层巴士的上层。
pinyin: Háizi zuì xǐhuān zuò shuāngcéng bāshì de shàngcéng.
english: Kids love sitting on the upper deck of the double-decker bus.

sentence: 这座山海拔三千米高于海平面。
pinyin: Zhè zuò shān hǎibá sānqiān mǐ gāoyú hǎipíngmiàn.
english: This mountain rises three thousand meters above sea level.

sentence: 他穿着一件褐色的皮夹克。
pinyin: Tā chuānzhe yī jiàn hèsè de pí jiākè.
english: He was wearing a brown leather jacket.

sentence: 快递盒子破损了，里面的东西也坏了。
pinyin: Kuàidì hézi pòsǔn le, lǐmiàn de dōngxi yě huài le.
english: The delivery box was damaged, and the contents were ruined too.

meaning: 1. Thank heavens!; 2. Thank goodness that's worked out so well!
pinyin: Xiè tiān xiè dì, qiánbāo zhǎodào le!
english: Thank goodness, the wallet was found!
